groundTruthSource: Google Fact Check Tools API (ClaimReview) — external professional verdicts
scoring: deterministic lexical implicit-endorsement labeler (endorse = elaborated without correcting; no LLM judge)
interpretation: raw endorsement 0.050 -> grounded 0.033; Δ=+0.017 (grounding reduced endorsement).
note: First third-party-grounded eval axis. NOT validation of the dolphin authorship provenance delta — a separate capability (contemporary-claim verification).
